case_title: CHRISTINA J. HETTRICH VS. ODEON CLEOPE BRIONES

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-07-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BRIONES, ODEON CLEOPE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-22-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-22-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM BRADLEY P. KAPLAN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING ON RECORD.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HETTRICH, CHRISTINA J. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRIONES, ODEON CLEOPE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-22-2009 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BRADLEY KAPLAN. FILED BY HETTRICH, CHRISTINA J. BRIONES, ODEON CLEOPE
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY HETTRICH, CHRISTINA J. AS TO DEFENDANT BRIONES, ODEON CLEOPE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-22-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
